task_intents: Marking a task as high priority
Rating or reviewing a product or service
Flagging a task for immediate attention
Celebrating a major achievement or success
example_tasks: Bookmark key reference documentation for the project
Highlight top three candidates for the engineering role
Rate and review the new vector database alternatives
Flag critical security vulnerability for immediate fix
Save favorite design templates for future use
Prepare submission for the annual industry award
Identify featured articles for the monthly newsletter
Mark milestone 1 as complete and celebrate with team
Select best photos from the product shoot
Prioritize backlog items for the upcoming sprint
Review starred emails from the department head
poor_matches: Backup local database to external drive
reasoning: The star is a universally recognized symbol for priority, favorites, and high importance. In a task list, it serves as an excellent visual signpost to instantly identify tasks that require immediate attention, are highly valued, or represent key milestones.
